# Al Sicomoro

> Eritrean & Ethiopian restaurant in Milano — traditional Horn of Africa cuisine with homemade injera, zighini, kitfo, and coffee ceremony.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://alsicomoro.com/): Full landing page — story, menu highlights, reviews, visit info
- [Menu](https://alsicomoro.com/menu.html): Complete menu with dish cards and categories
- [Chi Siamo](https://alsicomoro.com/chi-siamo.html): Family story — run by Zaid and Giulia
- [Contatti](https://alsicomoro.com/contatti.html): Contact, reservations, location, hours
- [Galleria](https://alsicomoro.com/galleria.html): Photo gallery (placeholder, noindex)
## English (EN)
- [Home (EN)](https://alsicomoro.com/en/): Full landing page in English
- [Menu (EN)](https://alsicomoro.com/en/menu.html): Complete menu in English
- [Chi Siamo (EN)](https://alsicomoro.com/en/chi-siamo.html): About page in English
- [Contatti (EN)](https://alsicomoro.com/en/contatti.html): Contact page in English

## Details

**Cuisine:** Traditional Eritrean & Ethiopian — injera (3-day teff fermentation), zighini (spiced stews), kitfo (minced beef), shiro (chickpea stew), tibs (sautéed meat).

**Address:** Via Panfilo Castaldi 19, 20124 Milano — near M1 Porta Venezia metro.

**Features:** Bilingual IT/EN menu and service, vegetarian and vegan options, traditional coffee ceremony, TheFork reservations available.

## Contact

Phone: +39 02 2563527 — Via Panfilo Castaldi 19, 20124 Milano
